ddls:
CREATE TABLE "billing_periods" (
  "billing_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the billing period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the billing period */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Type of billing cycle (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "billing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of billing (e.g., one-time, recurring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., storage, compute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_types" (
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage type */,
  "usage_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the usage type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the usage type */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the usage type (e.g., byte hours, instance hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation */,
  "operation_description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability_zones" (
  "availability_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the availability zone */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the availability zone is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate */,
  "rate_description" TEXT /* Description of the rate */,
  "rate_amount" REAL /* Amount of the rate */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_details" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage detail */,
  "billing_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing period */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the usage type */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation */,
  "availability_zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the availability zone */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate */,
  "usage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the usage */,
  "usage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the usage */,
  "usage_quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the usage */,
  "usage_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the usage */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the usage */,
  "user_billing" TEXT /* User billing information */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the resource used */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_details_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_details_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_details_user_billing FOREIGN KEY ("user_billing") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_details_availability_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("availability_zone_id") REFERENCES availability_zones ("availability_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_details_usage_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_type_id") REFERENCES usage_types ("usage_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_details_billing_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_period_id") REFERENCES billing_periods ("billing_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "billing_info" TEXT /* Billing information associated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user belongs */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_centers" (
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost center */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the cost center */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the cost center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_cost_centers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cost center */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the cost center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "cost_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_cost_centers" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cost center */,
  "allocation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the project budget allocated to the cost center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "cost_center_id")
)

Unique identifier for each usage type
